name: atlassian-jira
label: Atlassian Jira
description: JIRA is a issue tracking product, developed by Atlassian. It provides bug tracking, issue tracking, and project management functions.

triggers.name: newIssue
triggers.label: New Issue
triggers.description: Triggered when a new issue is created

triggers.name: issueUpdated
triggers.label: Issue Updated
triggers.description: Triggered when an existing issue is updated
